arts.ttl: Crystal Palace now fully in talks to sign player – Looks optimistic for Eagles
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Crystal Palace are looking to get a deal done for long term target Bright Osayi-Samuel. The Premier League side have been linked with the Fenerbahce defender for the past 12 months after reports of interest during the last January transfer window. arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Are Trevoh Chalobah, Alfie Gilchrist in line for Stamford Bridge returns?
arts.sum: Can Chelsea recall the likes of Trevoh Chalobah and Alfie Gilchrist on the back of a long-term injury suffered by Wesley Fofana?

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans urge Enzo Maresca to give teenager his first ever Premier League start vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Chelsea travel to Selhurst Park this afternoon to face London rivals Crystal Palace. Chelsea plays away at Palace on Saturday afternoon in the Premier League...

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer blunder revealed as Maresca's worst fears realised
arts.sum: Chelsea's failure to include a break clause in Trevoh Chalobah's loan deal is now coming back to haunt the club in the wake of Wesley Fofana's potentially season-ending injury. The game Maresca is referring to is Saturday's clash with Crystal Palace, which comes at an ironic time, to say the least.

arts.ttl: 'He is improving a lot': Enzo Maresca claims Chelsea star Levi Colwill is getting so much better at one thing
arts.sum: The Chelsea defence is under a bit of scrutiny right now because of its frequent changes and vulnerability, but Levi Colwill remains a consistent performer...

Enzo Maresca’s side are searching for a first win in four games, following a dip in form across the festive period. arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Chelsea – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: It’s South London against West London at Selhurst Park this weekend, as Crystal Palace entertain Chelsea. Crystal Palace showed character to end 2024 in winning style as they came from behind to beat Southampton. arts.ttl: Chelsea make huge £40m transfer decision as Enzo Maresca stance perfectly clear
arts.sum: Chelsea will not allow Carney Chukwuemeka to leave permanently this month for any less than his £40million release clause, football.london understands. Elsewhere, Chelsea could allow Cesare Casadei to leave the club on loan this month.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted Lineup vs. Crystal Palace: Premier League
arts.sum: Chelsea aim to return to winning ways vs. Crystal Palace looking to maintain their spot in the top four of the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Why isn't Crystal Palace vs Chelsea on TV? How to watch Premier League match in UK
arts.sum: Chelsea travel east to London rivals Crystal Palace on Saturday afternoon, but fans not attending the match are out of luck if wanting to watch on TV
